idf_component_register(
    SRCS
        "src/pet_buddy.c"
        "src/pet_host.c"
        "src/pet_registry.c"
        "src/pet_renderer.c"
        "src/pet_runtime.c"
    INCLUDE_DIRS
        "include"
    PRIV_INCLUDE_DIRS
        "private_include"
    REQUIRES
        display_session
        hw_gfx_runtime
        espressif__esp_mmap_assets
        json
        nvs_flash
)
